projects.name: Gems & Jewels
projects.description: A solo puzzle boardgame game where you place colored gem tiles on a 4x4 board to score points. (Coming soon to TIBM 2026)
projects.longDescription: Place tiles from your hand onto the board to create matches. Match shapes to clear adjacent tiles and score points. Chain reactions occur when border colors match, creating cascading combos. Features 5 gem types — circle, square, triangle, diamond, and star — each with unique colors. How high can you score before the board fills up?

projects.name: SVG Template Studio
projects.description: A browser-based tool for designing and exporting SVG card templates for board games.
projects.longDescription: Design professional card templates for your board games. Import CSV data, customize layouts with a step-by-step wizard, and export to PDF, SVG, or ZIP formats. Features live preview, adjustable card dimensions, and text/image placement controls.
